shellCommands.command: /bin/bash -lc "pwd && rg --files -g '"'!*node_modules*'"' | head -80 && printf '\\n--- package ---\\n' && sed -n '1,220p' package.json && printf '\\n--- next docs ---\\n' && if [ -d node_modules/next/dist/docs ]; then rg --files node_modules/next/dist/docs | head -40; else echo 'missing'; fi"

/bin/bash -lc "sed -n '1,220p' app/layout.tsx && printf '\\n--- page ---\\n' && sed -n '1,220p' app/page.tsx && printf '\\n--- config ---\\n' && sed -n '1,220p' next.config.ts && printf '\\n--- files ---\\n' && rg --files -g '"'!*node_modules*'"' -g '.*'"

/bin/bash -lc "rg --files node_modules/next/dist/docs | rg 'file-conventions/(proxy|middleware)|api-reference/file-conventions/(proxy|middleware)' && rg -n \"export function proxy|matcher|proxy.ts|Proxy runs\" node_modules/next/dist/docs/01-app node_modules/next/dist/docs/02-pages | head -100"

errors: `--dangerously-bypass-hook-trust` is enabled. Enabled hooks may run without review for this invocation.
